reminders.name: Appointment Reminder
reminders.templatePreview: Your appointment is scheduled for {time}. Please arrive 15 minutes early.

reminders.name: Appointment Reminder
reminders.templatePreview: Reminder: Appointment today at {time}. Reply CONFIRM to confirm.

reminders.name: Follow-up Reminder
reminders.templatePreview: Thank you for your visit. Please complete the follow-up survey at the link below.

reminders.name: Medication Reminder
reminders.templatePreview: Reminder to take your prescribed medication. Refills available.

reminders.name: Billing Statement
reminders.templatePreview: Your monthly billing statement is now available in your patient portal.

reminders.name: Lab Results Ready
reminders.templatePreview: Your lab results are now available in your patient portal.

reminders.name: Missed Appointment
reminders.templatePreview: You missed your appointment. Please contact us to reschedule.

reminders.name: Pre-Visit Forms
reminders.templatePreview: Please complete the attached intake forms before your upcoming visit.

reminders.name: Insurance Verification
reminders.templatePreview: We need to verify your insurance information before your visit.

reminders.name: Birthday Greeting
reminders.templatePreview: Wishing you a very happy birthday from all of us at the practice!

reminders.name: Annual Wellness Visit
reminders.templatePreview: It's time for your annual wellness visit. Schedule today.

reminders.name: Prescription Refill
reminders.templatePreview: Your prescription is due for a refill. Reply REFILL to request.

reminders.name: Telehealth Reminder
reminders.templatePreview: Telehealth visit starts soon. Click the link to join your appointment.

reminders.name: Survey Request
reminders.templatePreview: We value your feedback. Please share your visit experience.

reminders.name: Welcome Email
reminders.templatePreview: Welcome to our practice! Here's what to expect at your first visit.

reminders.name: Payment Receipt
reminders.templatePreview: Thank you for your payment. Your receipt is attached.

reminders.name: Co-pay Reminder
reminders.templatePreview: Your co-pay for today's visit is {amount}. Please bring payment.

reminders.name: Lab Order Ready
reminders.templatePreview: Your lab order is ready for pickup at the front desk.
